response:
```sql
SELECT 
  date_trunc('month', p.consent_date) AS month, 
  COUNT(*) AS monthly, 
  SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('month', p.consent_date)) AS cumulative 
FROM app.patients p 
JOIN app.studies st ON st.study_id = p.study_id 
WHERE st.code = 'MOON-2026' 
  AND p.sponsor_id = :sponsor 
  AND p.consent_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
GROUP BY date_trunc('month', p.consent_date) 
ORDER BY month
LIMIT 100;
```
